---
title: "My Fourth Quarto Document"
format: html
---



```{r}
#| label: setup
#| echo: false
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)

```

```{r}
diamonds %>%
	filter(carat <= 3, price <= 20000) %>%
	ggplot(aes(x = carat, y = price, color = cut)) +
	geom_point(alpha = 0.14, size = 0.8) +
	geom_smooth(se = FALSE, linewidth = 1.1, method = "loess", span = 0.8) +
	scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_dollar()) +
	scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
	labs(
		title = "Diamond price rises sharply with carat",
		subtitle = "Colored by cut grade; smooth curves show the overall trend",
		x = "Carat",
		y = "Price",
		color = "Cut"
	) +
	theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
	theme(
		plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18),
		plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray35", margin = margin(b = 10)),
		panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
		legend.position = "top",
		legend.justification = "left"
	)
```
